Ascend C matmul_min_subtract kernel implementation
AscendC kernel example for fused GEMM (X * W^T + bias), followed by elementwise min with scalar and subtract scalar on Ascend 910B

Ascend C matmul_min_subtract kernel implementation
AscendC custom kernel example for matmul with bias and fused post-ops (min with scalar then subtract scalar), including project.json, host tiling/operator, kernel, and PyTorch binding for Ascend 910B.

Ascend C matmul_min_subtract kernel implementation
Looking for an AscendC fused kernel example that performs matmul with bias (F.linear) followed by elementwise min with a scalar and scalar subtraction for float32 ND tensors, including project.json, tiling, operator registration, kernel code, and PyTorch NPU binding for Ascend 910B.
